message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant Index
participant "User\nController" as UC
database Database

User -> Index: GET: /users/signup
activate Index
Index -> UC: renderSignup()
activate UC
UC -> UC: render(index)
UC --> Index: display signup
deactivate UC
Index --> User: POST: /users/signup
Index -> UC: async signup()
activate UC
UC -> Database: User.findOne(email)
activate Database
Database --> UC: return false
deactivate Database

alt [user not found]
  alt [accept]
    UC -> UC: User.create()
    UC --> Index: display home
  else [refuse]
    UC --> Index: display home
  end
else [user already exist]
  UC --> Index: show error
end

deactivate UC
deactivate Index
@enduml
